states.name: Astrid
states.title: Red Dragon Bride
states.description:
Underneath the cloudless sky, Astrid appears in her finest attire yet, causing her secret admirers among the commoners and soldiers alike burst into deafening applause. However, she herself doesn't seem pleased with her outfit.
"I have been told this is going to be the presentation of a new combat uniform... They set me up...!"

states.name: Astrid
states.title: Red Dragon Bride
states.description:
"Looking good, Astrid!" a young man tells her after the ceremony.
"How insolent! You think you can mock me just because of this unbecoming outfit?" she snaps, face red with anger.
"No, I'm being serious!"
"You obviously are not! I won't let you get away with it!" she says but the man finds her embarrassment charming. "And what are you smiling at now, you oaf!?"

states.name: Astrid
states.title: Red Dragon Bride
states.description:
This must be some kind of a dream, because her beloved is here with her, smiling. And she can be herself and let her guard down too, even though usually she has to be the invulnerable Commander her knights need. Ah, what a sweet dream...
"But I have a mission to accomplish," she mumbles to herself as she wakes up, still reveling in faint traces of that dream's warmth.
